author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Anno 117: Pax Romana - The Hippodrome Trailer: Part One
The first part of a three-part trailer series for Anno 117: Pax Romana’s second DLC, The Hippodrome! Building the Hippodrome is no easy feat; it’s the largest monument in Latium (we really mean it). It can be unlocked with the Patricians and requires a great deal of resources. Can you master all five stages of construction?

About Anno 117: Pax Romana:
In the latest instalment of the award-winning Anno strategy franchise, it’s your destiny to shape the Roman Empire in the year 117 AD. As governor, will you encourage economic growth or expand your rule through dominance? Lead with rebellion or unite a diverse culture? 
The cost of peace is yours to decide.

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Dead by Daylight Event Trailer
Step into the Fog and celebrate 10 Years of Dead by Daylight in The Division 2, with a new Event Pass filled with cosmetics inspired by its chilling universe. Embrace the darkness 👀  

Learn more here: https://thedivision2.com/tu-y8s2-1-update-notes

About The Division 2:
Tom Clancy's The Division 2 is a shooter RPG with a thrilling campaign fully playable in co-op and multiple PVP modes.

In The Division 2, save your country in Washington, DC, and in the Warlords of New York expansion, hunt down Aaron Keener, a former Agent who has taken control of New York.

#Ubisoft #TheDivision2

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com
